steps.description: Write SKILL.md + references/modes.md + references/output_format.md in skills/iw-research/
Review skill for IW pattern compliance, 500-line limit, tool chain correctness
Final review + sync skill to .claude/skills/ via iw sync-skills

steps.command: python3 -c "import yaml; f=open('skills/iw-research/SKILL.md'); content=f.read(); lines=content.split('---',2); fm=yaml.safe_load(lines[1]); assert fm['name']=='iw-research'; body_lines=len(lines[2].splitlines()); assert body_lines<=500, f'SKILL.md body is {body_lines} lines (max 500)'; print(f'PASS: {body_lines} lines, name={fm[\"name\"]}')"
steps.description: QV: Validate SKILL.md frontmatter and line count

steps.command: iw sync-skills && ls .claude/skills/iw-research/SKILL.md && echo 'PASS: skill synced'
steps.description: QV: Sync skill to .claude/skills/ and verify deployment
